actions.intent: Break the first ice on the visible frozen rescue lane.
Shape the right side of the spectacle lane without adding dock pressure.
Clear supporting material above the frozen path.
Bring the secondary puppy close to rescue readiness.
Open the hero puppy's right side and cash a dock clear.
Use safe upper material while keeping the route readable.
Stabilize dock before the final ice reveal.
Break the central ice that completes the warm path.
Cash one more dock clear before the extraction beat.
Finish the thawed lane and extract both puppies together.

notes: Designer golden for the spectacle recovery level: the frozen lane resolves into a simultaneous rescue payoff.
